/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -fPIC -Wno-enum-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libSpectrometerDriver.so -o ../libs/linux64/release/libSpectrometerDriver.so CMakeFiles/SpectrometerDriver.dir/Detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerDriver.dir/DriverMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerDriver.dir/SpectrometerDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerDriver.dir/stdafx.cpp.o  ../libs/linux64/release/libKromekDriver.a -ludev -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic
